name: Sketchy's Contract
short_description: A 1-8 player co-op sci-fi looter horror game that takes place on a mysterious asteroid belt where players must complete contracts by traveling to exotic planets to kill creatures, find loot, and/or farm planetary materials that they must return to an ominous figure named Sketchy.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Loot +18
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: 70s-style Robot Anime Geppy-X
short_description: A fully remastered 70s-style super robot anime meets fast-paced arcade-style 2D side-scrolling shooter action. A Japanese cult classic finally available worldwide — now reborn in HD.

name: DozenChess
short_description: Dozen Chess is a turn-based strategy roguelike that reinterprets the rules of chess into a modern tactical RPG. Players must utilize limited resources and action points to optimally deploy their pieces, combine unique skills, and overcome a trial consisting of 12 distinct stages.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: RPG +10
成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10

name: Zero To Hero Idle
short_description: A pixel art idle RPG built for pure progression. Defeat monsters, find Mythic gear, and automate your ascent from Squire to King. Build your village, prestige for massive multipliers, and watch numbers soar. No fluff, just deep incremental strategy.

name: Denshattack!

name: Teeto

name: Tower Command

name: CAUTION WET PAINT
short_description: A game about watching paint dry. Don't touch the paint while it's wet, or you lose!

name: Denshattack! Soundtrack
short_description: Denshattack! (Original Game Soundtrack) features high-energy, electronic, breakbeat, and fast-paced arcade tunes that perfectly accompany the colorful universe of the train-flipping platformer.

name: 101 Cats in Budapest
short_description: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 kittens 🐾 in the hand-crafted Budapest landscape. 🏆 Earn lots of achievements. How many 😺 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

name: Hue Factory
short_description: A colorful, minimalist automation game. Place machines, mix colors, and manage the flow of an evolving factory. Listen to the hum of the machines and watch the colors blend while keeping your lines efficient.

name: Miney Golf
short_description: Miney Golf is a casual miniature golf strategy game where players can pick up and place land mines all over a destructible course to either help them traverse obstacles or mess with their opponents. Play through several courses with your friends online through Steam!

name: Just A Regular Night Patrol
short_description: 'Just A Regular Night Patrol' is a first-person simulation game. Over the course of 8 days, review and execute your daily tasks based on the instructions. No jumpscares or anomalies. The goal is to simply be an ordinary night security guard and complete your shifts without making mistakes.
